# Bright Data Docs

## Docs

- [Account Management](https://docs.brightdata.com/account-management-quickstart.md)
- [Agent Web Access](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/agents.md): Complete web infrastructure for AI agents that need reliable, scalable web access. Achieves 99.3% success rate on production workloads.
- [Answer Engine](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/answer-engine.md): Build AI answer engines that retrieve, verify and deliver cited responses in real time. Achieves 97% factual accuracy on production workloads.
- [Data Enrichment Agent Quickstart](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/cookbooks/data-enrichment.md): Build an AI data enrichment agent in 10 minutes using LangGraph and Bright Data. Automate research and structured extraction from public web sources end-to-end.
- [Sales Intelligence with Haystack](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/cookbooks/haystack-sales-intelligence.md): Build an AI sales research assistant in 5 stages with Haystack, MongoDB Atlas and Bright Data. Pulls live data from LinkedIn, Crunchbase and news for RAG Q&A.
- [Deep Research](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/deep-research.md): Build AI research agents with Bright Data (660+ scrapers): real-time SERP, historical data and multi-step site navigation for competitive intelligence.
- [Data Enrichment](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/enrichment.md): Build AI agents that fill CRM fields, enrich leads and complete records using the Bright Data search-and-extract pattern (660+ scrapers) for high-volume runs.
- [Query Bright Data Docs from Your Agent](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/for-agents/docs-mcp.md): Connect your AI coding agent to Bright Data's docs via Model Context Protocol. Retrieve 660+ scraper docs as native MCP resources, no scraping required.
- [LLM-Friendly Documentation References](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/for-agents/llm-references.md): Plain-text and machine-readable versions of all Bright Data documentation across 660+ pages, built for AI agents, RAG pipelines and LLM context injection.
- [Bright Data for AI Coding Agents](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/for-agents/overview.md): Everything a coding agent needs to work with Bright Data - LLM-optimized docs, skills, MCP server, and plain-text references. Covers 100+ sources.
- [Bright Data Skills for Coding Agents](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/for-agents/skills.md): Install Bright Data skills (660+ scrapers) into your AI coding agent for best-practice API usage, working scripts and embedded product knowledge instantly.
- [Web Data Infrastructure for AI](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/introduction.md): Bright Data web infrastructure for AI: production APIs (660+ scrapers), SDKs and headless browsers that let LLMs and agents search, read and extract live data.
- [LLM Grounding & Evaluation](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/llm-grounding.md): Build AI systems that fact-check model outputs, validate training data and ground LLMs in live web data across 660+ Bright Data scrapers with verification.
- [Web MCP Quickstart](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server-quickstart.md): Get started with the Bright Data Web MCP server. Configure your API key, connect a compatible client and run your first scrape in a few minutes.
- [FAQ: MCP](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/faqs.md): FAQs about the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools): setup, hosted versus self-hosted modes, available tools, token usage and billing for AI agents.
- [Agent Builder MCP Server Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/agent-builder.md): Connect OpenAI Agent Builder to the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) to build AI agents with real-time web search, scraping and structured data access.
- [OpenAI's ChatGPT MCP Server Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/chat-gpt.md): Connect ChatGPT to the Bright Data MCP server to give your custom GPTs real-time web search, scraping and structured data access in a few setup steps.
- [Claude Desktop Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/claude.md): Connect Claude Desktop to the Bright Data MCP server to give Claude real-time web search, scraping and structured data access. Exposes 60+ tools.
- [Claude Code MCP Server Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/claude-code.md): Connect Claude Code to the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) with a 1-line install command to give your coding agent real-time web search and scraping.
- [Cloudflare Agents SDK Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/cloudflare-agents.md): How to integrate Cloudflare's Agents SDK with Bright Data's Web MCP server for building AI agents on Cloudflare Workers. Exposes 60+ MCP tools.
- [CrewAI Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/crewai.md): Connect CrewAI multi-agent crews to the Bright Data MCP server, using either the hosted endpoint or self-hosted mode for real-time web data access.
- [Cursor MCP Server Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/cursor.md): Connect Cursor IDE to the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) in either hosted or self-hosted mode, for AI coding assistant web search and scraping.
- [Google ADK Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/google-adk.md): Connect Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) to the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) for Gemini-powered agents with web search and structured extraction.
- [LangChain Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/langchain.md): Connect LangChain and LangGraph agents to the Bright Data MCP server to add real-time web search, scraping and structured data tools to your AI workflows.
- [LlamaIndex Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/llamaindex.md): Connect LlamaIndex agents to the Bright Data MCP server to add live web search, scraping and structured data retrieval to your RAG and indexing pipelines.
- [How to Set Up the Web MCP with n8n](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/n8n.md): Connect the Bright Data MCP server to n8n to build automated, no-code data workflows with web search, scraping and structured extraction nodes.
- [NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/nvidia-nemo.md): Connect the NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit to the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) to give NeMo-powered agents web search, scraping and structured data.
- [OpenAI SDK Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/openai.md): Connect the OpenAI SDK to the Bright Data MCP server to give GPT-4o and o-series models real-time web search, scraping and structured data access.
- [MCP server integrations overview](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/overview.md): Connect Bright Data's MCP server (60+ tools) to AI frameworks and agent tools to give models real-time web access for search, scraping and browsing tasks.
- [Snowflake Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/snowflake.md): Connect Snowflake Cortex to the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) to enrich tables with live web data and run automated extraction inside your warehouse.
- [Vapi AI MCP Server Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/vapi.md): Connect Vapi AI voice agents to the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) to give voice assistants real-time web search, scraping and structured data retrieval.
- [VS Code MCP Server Integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/integrations/vscode.md): Connect VS Code MCP-enabled chat to the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) to give GitHub Copilot real-time web search, scraping and structured data tools.
- [Local MCP server advanced configuration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/local/advanced.md): Customize the local Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools): enable Browser API, configure proxies, set rate limits and pass environment variables.
- [How to Set Up Local (Self-hosted) MCP](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/local/quickstart.md): Set up a self-hosted Bright Data MCP server: step-by-step installation, configuration and connection to AI agents like Claude or Cursor in under 10 minutes.
- [MCP Server Overview](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/overview.md): Use the Bright Data MCP server to give AI agents real-time access to public web data with 5,000 free requests per month and zero infrastructure setup.
- [Remote MCP server advanced configuration](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/remote/advanced.md): Customize the remote Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools): configure auth tokens, switch proxies, tune timeouts and enable advanced tools per session.
- [How to Get Started with Remote MCP Server](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/remote/quickstart.md): Connect AI agents to the fully managed Bright Data Remote MCP server (60+ tools) with no setup: authentication, tool selection and a working sample request.
- [Tools](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/tools.md): Reference for the Bright Data MCP server tools (60+ tools): web search, scraping, structured data and platform extractors for ecommerce and social workflows.
- [TOON Format](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/toon.md): Use Token-Oriented Object Notation (TOON) with the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools) to cut token usage on large web data payloads without losing structure.
- [MCP Usage Examples](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server/usage-examples.md): Browse community demos and reference projects built on the Bright Data MCP server (60+ tools), covering AI agents, scraping pipelines and integrations.
- [Training Data for AI Models](https://docs.brightdata.com/ai/training.md): Technical overview of Bright Data infrastructure (660+ scrapers) for building AI training data pipelines: large-scale acquisition, extraction and delivery.
- [Python SDK](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/SDK.md): Install the Bright Data Python SDK (660+ scrapers) to scrape URLs, search the web, run platform scrapers and connect Playwright to the Browser API.
- [JavaScript SDK](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/SDK-JS.md): Install and use the Bright Data JavaScript SDK (660+ scrapers) to scrape URLs, search Google/Bing/Yandex and connect to the Browser API from Node.js.
- [Add Static IP(s)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Add_Static_Datacenter_ISP_IPs.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to add Static IP(s). POST /zone/ips returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Add a Zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Add_a_Zone.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to add a Zone. POST /zone returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Change Account Status](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Change_account_status.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to change Account Status. PUT /status returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Cost breakdown export](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Export_cost_breakdown.md): Export account cost data by dimension (products, APIs, datasets, Web Scraper APIs). Same source as Cost Explorer. JSON or CSV per-day, 200 OK on success.
- [Get account available countries](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_Available_Countries.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to get account available countries. GET /countrieslist returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Zone Statistics](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_Zone_Static_Datacenter_ISP_IPs.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to zone Statistics. GET /zone/ips returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Zone info](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_Zone_info.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to zone info. GET /zone returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Zone Password](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_Zone_passwords.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to zone Password. GET /zone/passwords returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Zone Permission](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_Zone_permissions.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to zone Permission. GET /zone/permissions returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Zone status](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_Zone_status.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to zone status. GET /zone/status returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Account status](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_account_status.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to account status. GET /status returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Active Zones](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_active_Zones.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to active Zones. GET /zone/get_active_zones returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Get available dedicated IPs per Zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_all_available_dedicated_residential_IPs_per_Zone.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to get available dedicated IPs per Zone via GET /zone/route_vips, returning JSON zone or account data with 200 OK.
- [Available Datacenter and ISP IPs](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_amount_of_available_Datacenter_and_ISP_IPs.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to available Datacenter and ISP IPs via GET /zone/count_available_ips, returning a 200 OK JSON response.
- [Get Country Cities](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_country_cities.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to get Country Cities. GET /cities returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Get current service status](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_current_service_status.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to get current service status via GET /network_status/{NETWORK_TYPE}, returning a 200 OK JSON response.
- [List static network cities by country](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_list_of_available_cities_of_static_network_per_country.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to list static network cities by country via GET /zone/static/cities, returning a 200 OK JSON response.
- [Live status of Static Zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_live_status_of_Static_Datacenter_ISP_Zone_and_IPs_with_connectivity_problem.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to live status of Static Zone. GET /zone/ips/unavailable returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Recent IPs attempting to use your Zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_recent_IPs_attempting_to_use_your_Zone.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to recent IPs attempting to use your Zone via GET /zone/recent_ips, returning JSON zone or account data with 200 OK.
- [Available Datacenter & ISP IPs/Zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_the_available_Data_center_ISP_IPs_per_Zone.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to available Datacenter & ISP IPs/Zone. GET /zone/route_ips returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Bandwidth stats for a zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_the_bandwidth_stats_for_a_Zone.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to bandwidth stats for a zone. GET /zone/bw returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Bandwidth stats for all your zones](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_the_bandwidth_stats_for_all_your_Zones.md): Retrieve bandwidth consumption stats for every Bright Data API across your account in 1 request, with totals returned per product and time window as JSON.
- [Total cost & bandwidth for a zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_the_total_cost_and_bandwidth_stats_for_a_Zone.md): Returns 200 OK with billed cost, bandwidth and usage for a Zone over a date range. Matches the Control Panel Usage Overview and your invoice.
- [Total Balance](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Get_total_balance_through_API.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to total Balance. GET /customer/balance returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Migrate Static IPs between zones](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Migrate_Static_Datacenter_ISP_IPs_between_zones.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to migrate Static IPs between zones. POST /zone/ips/migrate returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Refresh Static IPs (Datacenter/ISP)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Refresh_Static_Datacenter_ISP_IPs.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to refresh Static IPs (Datacenter/ISP) via POST /zone/ips/refresh, returning JSON zone or account data with 200 OK.
- [Refresh dedicated residential IPs](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Refresh_dedicated_residential_IPs.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to refresh dedicated residential IPs via POST /zone/ips/refresh, returning JSON zone or account data with 200 OK.
- [Remove Static IPs (Datacenter/ISP)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Remove_Static_Datacenter_ISP_IPs.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to remove Static IPs (Datacenter/ISP). DELETE /zone/ips returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Remove a Zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Remove_Zone.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to remove a Zone. DELETE /zone returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Remove dedicated residential IPs](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Remove_dedicated_residential_IPs.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to remove dedicated residential IPs. DELETE /zone/vips returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Switch Automatic Failover](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Switch_100_uptime_ON_OFF_in_a_Static_zone.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to switch Automatic Failover. POST /zone/switch_100uptime returns the requested zone or account configuration data.
- [Turn on/off Zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/Turn_on_off_Zone.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to turn on/off Zone. POST /zone/change_disable returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Add Zone Password](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/add-zone-password.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to add Zone Password. POST /zone/add_password returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Allowlist IP(s)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/allowlist-ip.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to allowlist IP(s). POST /zone/whitelist returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Allowlist/Denylist Domain(s)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/allowlist-or-denylist-domains.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to allowlist/Denylist Domain(s). POST /zone/domain_perm returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Denylist IP(s)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/denylist-ip.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to denylist IP(s). POST /zone/blacklist returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Domain Consumption](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/domain-consumption.md): Retrieve per-domain usage metrics including bandwidth and request count from the Bright Data Domain Consumption API. Returns 200 OK with JSON results.
- [All Zones](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/get-all-zones.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to all Zones. GET /zone/get_all_zones returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [Get Proxies Pending Replacement](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/get-proxies-pending-replacement.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to get Proxies Pending Replacement via GET /zone/proxies_pending_replacement, returning a 200 OK JSON response.
- [Remove domain from allow/denylist](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/remove-domain-from-zone-allowlist-or-denylist.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to remove domain from allow/denylist via DELETE /zone/domain_perm, returning JSON zone or account data with 200 OK.
- [Remove IP from Zone allowlist](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/remove-ip-from-zone-allowlist.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to remove IP from Zone allowlist. DELETE /zone/whitelist returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Remove IP from Zone denylist](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/remove-ip-from-zone-denylist.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to remove IP from Zone denylist. DELETE /zone/blacklist returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Remove Zone Password](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/remove-zone-password.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to remove Zone Password. POST /zone/remove_password returns 200 OK with zone or account configuration data as JSON.
- [List of allowlisted IPs for a zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/zone-ip-allowlist.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to list of allowlisted IPs for a zone. GET /zone/whitelist returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [List of denylisted IPs for a zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/account-management-api/zone-ip-denylist.md): Use the Bright Data Account Management API to list of denylisted IPs for a zone. GET /zone/blacklist returns 200 OK with zone or account JSON.
- [Deliver snapshot to S3 or Azure Blob](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/archive-api/deliver-to-cloud.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Archive API to deliver snapshot to S3 or Azure Blob. Manages web archive snapshots and returns job status as JSON.
- [Get All Search Statuses](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/archive-api/get-all-search-statuses.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Archive API to get All Search Statuses. GET /webarchive/searches manages web archive snapshots; returns 200 OK with JSON status.
- [Get the Statuses of all Data Snapshots](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/archive-api/get-all-snapshots-statuses.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Archive API to get statuses of all Data Snapshots. Manages web archive snapshots; returns 200 OK with JSON job status.
- [Get Search Status](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/archive-api/get-search-status.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Archive API to get Search Status. GET /webarchive/search/{search_id} returns 200 OK with archive search status JSON.
- [Get Status of Data Snapshot](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/archive-api/get-snapshot-status.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Archive API to get Status of a Data Snapshot. Manages web archive snapshots; returns 200 OK with JSON job status.
- [Run a Search](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/archive-api/run-a-search.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Archive API to run a Search. POST /webarchive/search manages web archive snapshots; returns 200 OK with JSON status.
- [Authentication](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/authentication.md): Authenticate with Bright Data using 1 of 2 methods: API Access with an API key or Native Access with proxy username and password. Billed at the same rate.
- [Get Browser Session](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/browser-api/get-session.md): Use the Bright Data Browser API to get a Browser Session. GET /browser_sessions/{session_id} returns 200 OK with session metadata as JSON.
- [List Browser Session](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/browser-api/get-sessions.md): Use the Bright Data Browser API to list Browser Sessions. GET /browser_sessions returns 200 OK with active or historical session metadata as JSON.
- [Cancel Request](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/cancel-request.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to cancel Request. POST /request/{id}/cancel returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Create Preview](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/create-preview.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to create Preview. POST /preview returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Download Results](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/download-results.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to download Results. GET /request/{id}/download returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Enhance Query](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/enhance-query.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to enhance Query. POST /enhance_query returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Enrich Column](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/enrich-column.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to enrich Column. POST /request/{id}/enrich returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Get Preview Data](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/get-preview-data.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to get Preview Data. GET /preview/{id} returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Get Request Data](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/get-request-data.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to get Request Data. GET /request/{id} returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Get Request Status](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/get-request-status.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to get Request Status. GET /request/{id}/status returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Deep Lookup API overview](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/overview.md): Bright Data Deep Lookup API: search and extract structured records from the public web programmatically. Pay-per-result with 200 OK JSON over HTTPS.
- [Trigger Full Request](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/deep-lookup/trigger-full-request.md): Use the Bright Data Deep Lookup API to trigger Full Request. POST /trigger returns enriched records as JSON with 200 OK on success.
- [Discover API](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/discover/overview.md): The Bright Data Discover API retrieves search results and automatically evaluates their relevance based on an AI-driven intent parameter. Covers 31 languages.
- [Retrieve Results](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/discover/retrieve-results.md): Fetch ranked search results from the Bright Data Discover API (31 languages) using a task_id. Each result includes URL, title, snippet and relevance score.
- [Bulk update view delivery settings](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/bulk-update-view-delivery-settings.md): Apply one delivery configuration to multiple Bright Data dataset views in a single request. Spans 250+ domains in the Bright Data marketplace.
- [Deliver Snapshot](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/deliver-snapshot.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Dataset API to deliver a Snapshot. POST /datasets/snapshots/{id}/deliver returns 200 OK with metadata as JSON.
- [Snapshot Content](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/download-the-file-by-snapshot_id.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Dataset API to download Snapshot Content. GET /datasets/snapshots/{id}/download returns 200 OK with metadata as JSON.
- [Filter Dataset (BETA)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/filter-dataset.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Dataset API to filter Dataset (BETA). Spans 250+ domains in the Bright Data marketplace.
- [Filter Dataset (JSON or File Uploads)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/filter-dataset-with-csv-json-files.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Dataset API to filter Dataset (JSON or File Uploads). Spans 250+ domains in the Bright Data marketplace.
- [Dataset list](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/get-dataset-list.md): List every Bright Data dataset ID for all Web Scraper APIs available on your account. Spans 250+ domains in the Bright Data marketplace.
- [Get Dataset Metadata](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/get-dataset-metadata.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Dataset API to get Dataset Metadata. GET /datasets/{dataset_id}/metadata returns 200 OK with snapshot metadata as JSON.
- [Get dataset views](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/get-dataset-views.md): List your dataset views with IDs, names and underlying dataset across 250+ domains so you can configure or update delivery settings for each subscription.
- [Get delivery options](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/get-delivery-options.md): List the supported delivery destinations, filename templates and batch settings you can use when configuring delivery for a dataset view. Covers 250+ domains.
- [Get destination type schema](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/get-destination-type-schema.md): Retrieve the exact fields and credentials required to configure a specific delivery destination type such as s3, sftp, gcs or webhook.
- [Get Snapshot Metadata](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/get-snapshot-meta.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Dataset API to get Snapshot Metadata. Spans 250+ domains in the Bright Data marketplace.
- [Get Snapshot Parts](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/get-snapshot-parts.md): Use the Bright Data Marketplace Dataset API to get Snapshot Parts. GET /datasets/snapshots/{id}/parts returns 200 OK with snapshot metadata as JSON.
- [Get view delivery settings](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/get-view-delivery-settings.md): Retrieve the current delivery configuration for a Bright Data dataset view (250+ domains): destination, credentials, filename, compression and batch size.
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/troubleshooting.md): Troubleshoot 4xx and 5xx errors from the Bright Data Unlocker API, SERP API, Web Scraper API, Marketplace Dataset API and Web Scraper IDE with fixes.
- [Update view delivery settings](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/marketplace-dataset-api/update-view-delivery-settings.md): Set the delivery destination, credentials, filename template and batch options for a single dataset view. Returns the updated view id. Covers 250+ domains.
- [Bright Data API Postman collection](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/postman-collection.md): Quickly test and explore Bright Data's APIs (660+ scrapers) using our Postman collection. View, run and fork requests without setting up your own backend.
- [Add a User](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/add_a_user.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to add a User. Updates the local Proxy Manager (default port 22999) configuration and returns a JSON status.
- [Allowlist IPs](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/allowlist-ips.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to allowlist IPs. Updates the local Proxy Manager (default port 22999) configuration and returns a JSON status.
- [Ban an IP (All Ports)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/ban_an_ip_for_all_ports.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to ban an IP (All Ports). Calls POST /api/banip on the local Proxy Manager port 22999.
- [Ban an IP](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/ban_an_ip_single_.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to ban an IP. Calls POST /api/proxies/{PORT}/banip on the local Proxy Manager port 22999.
- [Ban multiple IPs (array)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/ban_ips_array_.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to ban multiple IPs (array). Endpoint: POST /api/proxies/{PORT}/banips on port 22999.
- [Create new Proxy Port](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/create_a_new_proxy_port.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to create new Proxy Port. Calls POST /api/proxies on the local Proxy Manager port 22999.
- [Delete a Proxy Port](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/delete_a_proxy_port.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to delete a Proxy Port. Calls DELETE /api/proxies/{PORT} on the local Proxy Manager port 22999.
- [Delete Proxy Ports (multiple)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/delete_proxy_ports.md): Bright Data Proxy Manager API endpoint to delete Proxy Ports (multiple). Endpoint: POST /api/proxies/delete on port 22999.
- [Enable SSL Analyzing (All Ports)](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/enable_ssl_analyzing_on_all_proxy_ports.md): Bright Data Proxy Manager API endpoint to enable SSL Analyzing (All Ports). Endpoint: POST /api/enable_ssl on port 22999.
- [Generate API key](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/generate_token_for_token_based_authentication.md): Generate a Bright Data Proxy Manager API key for token-based authentication. Endpoint: GET /api/gen_token on port 22999.
- [Get all users](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/get_all_users.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to get all users. Updates the local Proxy Manager (default port 22999) configuration and returns a JSON status.
- [Get allocated gIPs in a zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/get_allocated_gips_in_zone.md): Bright Data Proxy Manager API endpoint to get allocated gIPs in a zone. Endpoint: GET /api/allocated_vips on port 22999.
- [Get allocated IPs in a zone](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/get_allocated_ips_in_zone.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to get allocated IPs in a zone. Calls GET /api/allocated_ips on the local Proxy Manager port 22999.
- [Get Banned IPs](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/get_banned_ips.md): Use the Bright Data Proxy Manager API to get Banned IPs. Calls GET /api/banlist/{PORT} on the local Proxy Manager port 22999.

- [Get enabled Zone's configuration](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/proxy-manager/get_enabled_zones_configuration.md): Bright Data Proxy Manager API endpoint to get enabled Zone's configuration. Calls GET /api/zones on the local Proxy Manager port 22999.

- [Crawl API](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/rest-api/scraper/crawl-api.md): Trigger a Bright Data Crawl API collection that maps and extracts content across an entire domain. Returns a snapshot ID across 660+ Bright Data scrapers.
- [SERP async response](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/rest-api/serp/get-results.md): Use the Bright Data SERP API async endpoint (31 languages). GET /serp/get_result submits or retrieves a queued SERP request and returns 200 OK as JSON.
- [SERP async request](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/rest-api/serp/request.md): Use the Bright Data SERP API async endpoint (31 languages). POST /serp/req submits or retrieves a queued SERP request and returns 200 OK as JSON.

- [Unlocker async response](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/rest-api/unlocker/get-results.md): Use the Bright Data Unlocker API (98% success rate) async endpoint. GET /unblocker/get_result submits or retrieves a queued unlock request as JSON.

- [Unlocker API](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/rest-api/unlocker/unlock-website.md): Use the Bright Data Unlocker API (98% success rate) to test and unlock websites in real time, bypassing anti-bot protections, proxies and CAPTCHAs.

- [Receive batch data](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/scraper-studio-api/Receive_batch_data.md): GET /dca/dataset?id=<id> serves a Bright Data Scraper Studio collection: a status object while building, a JSON array of records when ready.

- [Trigger async batch collection](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/scraper-studio-api/Trigger_a_scraper_for_batch_collection_method.md): POST /dca/trigger queues a Bright Data Scraper Studio collector to run against one or more inputs. Returns a collection_id to poll for the dataset.
- [AI Job Progress](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/scraper-studio-api/ai-flow/ai-job-progress.md): Use the Bright Data Scraper Studio AI Flow API to get AI job progress. Returns 200 OK with AI scraper template or job progress data as JSON.

POST /dca/trigger_immediate returns 200 OK with real-time scrape JSON.

- [Get job metadata](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/scraper-studio-api/job-data.md): GET /dca/log/{job_id} returns metadata for a Bright Data Scraper Studio job: status, input counts, output line counts, failures and run timestamps.

- [Google Reviews text search](https://docs.brightdata.com/api-reference/serp/google-reviews/text-search.md): Configure the Bright Data Google Reviews Google Reviews text search parameter to refine queries and return matching results as JSON or HTML. On port 33335.

- [AI Web Scrapers Documentation](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/ai-scrapers.md): Use Bright Data AI scrapers across 5 platforms (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Grok, Google AI Mode) to retrieve structured prompt responses with citations.
- [Scrapers library API reference](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/api-reference.md): Full API reference for Bright Data's Scrapers Library, including endpoints for triggering collections, retrieving snapshots, and managing jobs.
- [Custom inputs](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/custom-inputs.md): Add custom fields to a Bright Data Web Scraper API input schema (660+ pre-built scrapers); values you send are returned in each output record for tagging.
- [Deadline Feature](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/deadline-feature.md): Limit how long a Bright Data Web Scraper API (660+ scrapers) trigger request waits when a snapshot may take a long time to finish.
- [Delivery Options](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/delivery-options.md): Configure Bright Data Web Scraper API delivery: API download, S3, Azure Blob, GCS, SFTP and webhook endpoints with JSON, NDJSON and CSV output formats.
- [Error codes by Endpoint](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/error-list-by-endpoint.md): Reference of Bright Data Web Scraper API error codes grouped by endpoint with cause and fix for 4xx and 5xx responses across trigger, snapshot and delivery.
- [Scrapers FAQs](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/faqs.md): FAQs about Bright Data Scrapers (660+ pre-built scrapers) covering setup, authentication, data formats, pricing and large-scale data extraction.
- [Clay integration](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/integrations/clay.md): Integrate Bright Data's Web Scraper API (660+ pre-built scrapers) with Clay to automate data collection and enrich workflows with structured web data.
- [Scrapers Library overview](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/overview.md): Use Bright Data's Scrapers Library to extract structured data from 660+ pre-built scrapers via synchronous or asynchronous API calls.
- [Scrapers - Quick Start](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/quickstart.md): Get started with the Bright Data Scrapers Library (660+ pre-built scrapers): pick a target site, trigger a collection, and retrieve results in 3 steps.
- [Streamed and file delivery](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/stream-and-file-delivery.md): Configure streamed delivery to receive large snapshots in real-time batches across 660+ scrapers, or file delivery to retrieve raw page files alongside data.
- [Success Rate alerts for Scrapers](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/success-rate.md): Configure per-scraper email alerts in the Bright Data Control Panel for any of 660+ scrapers when a Web Scraper API success rate drops or recovers.
- [Working with Sources in AI Scrapers](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/scrapers-library/working-with-sources.md): Work with citation sources in Bright Data AI scrapers across 5 platforms: source generation, handling source errors and prompting for verifiable output.
- [Async TikTok Data Collection](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/tiktok/async-requests.md): Trigger large-scale TikTok scraping jobs, monitor progress, and retrieve results using the Bright Data async /trigger endpoint. Supports batches of 20 URLs.
- [TikTok Data Delivery to Amazon S3](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/tiktok/data-delivery/amazon-s3.md): Configure the Bright Data TikTok Scraper API to deliver scraped profiles, posts, comments and shop data directly to your Amazon S3 bucket on job completion.
- [TikTok Data Delivery via Webhook](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/tiktok/data-delivery/webhooks.md): Configure the Bright Data TikTok Scraper API to push scraped profiles, posts and comments to your HTTPS webhook as each job completes across 5 endpoints.
- [TikTok Scraper API](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/tiktok/introduction.md): Extract structured data from TikTok profiles, posts, comments, and shop products using the Bright Data TikTok Scraper API. Handles up to 20 URLs per request.
- [TikTok Scraper Quickstart](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/tiktok/quickstart.md): Set up the Bright Data TikTok Scraper API and collect your first profile, post or shop record as structured JSON in under 5 minutes from the Control Panel.

- [Build a daily Amazon price monitor](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/tutorials/amazon-price-monitor.md): Schedule a daily Amazon SKU scrape with the Bright Data Amazon Scraper API, delivered to S3 and orchestrated by a GitHub Actions cron workflow.
- [Send LinkedIn profiles to your CRM](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/tutorials/linkedin-to-crm.md): Build a pipeline that scrapes LinkedIn profiles with Bright Data and delivers CRM-ready contact records to a Next.js 14 webhook handler deployed on Vercel.
- [Build a keyword social listener](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/tutorials/social-listener.md): Build a keyword social listener with Bright Data SERP API (31 languages) and social scrapers. Discover Instagram, TikTok and X posts, then collect full data.
- [Async Batch Requests for X (Twitter)](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/twitter/async-requests.md): Trigger large-scale X scraping jobs, monitor progress, and retrieve results using the Bright Data async /trigger endpoint. Handles up to 20 URLs per request.

- [X (Twitter) Scraper API](https://docs.brightdata.com/datasets/scrapers/twitter/introduction.md): Use the Bright Data X (Twitter) Scraper API to extract structured data from profiles and posts. Handles up to 20 URLs per request.

- [Fast Images Search](https://docs.brightdata.com/fast-images-search.md): Use Bright Data Fast SERP (31 languages) for Google Images via the native proxy interface. Receive compact JSON image results suited for real-time applications.

- [About the Bright Rewards Program](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/billing-and-pricing/bright-rewards-program.md): Earn Bright Points each month based on Bright Data spending and redeem them as account credit when adding funds. Higher monthly spend unlocks larger rewards.
- [Track Your Usage with Costs Explorer](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/billing-and-pricing/costs-explorer.md): Use Costs Explorer in the Bright Data Control Panel to track usage and costs across all your APIs. Filter by product, date and proxy in 3 clicks.

- [Payment](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/billing-and-pricing/payment.md): FAQs on payments for Bright Data accounts across 3 areas: prepayment, automatic recharging and the accepted payment methods on the platform.
- [Accepted Payment Methods](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/billing-and-pricing/payment-methods.md): Pay for Bright Data services with 4 options (PayPal, credit card, wire transfer, crypto). Set your default from the billing page in the Control Panel.
- [Payment Method Verification](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/billing-and-pricing/payment-verification.md): Why a payment method is required to access Proxy Networks and Web Unlocker API on a free trial across 4 product lines, and how to add one in 2 steps.
- [Premium IPs (deprecated)](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/billing-and-pricing/premium-ips.md): Premium IPs are deprecated and no longer offered by Bright Data. Use 1 of 4 alternatives (Datacenter, ISP, Residential or Mobile) for equivalent IP quality.
- [Bright Data Promo Codes](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/billing-and-pricing/promo-codes.md): Find and apply Bright Data promo codes in 3 steps to get exclusive discounts on subscription plans, products and services across the platform.

- [Account Management Overview](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/overview.md): Manage your Bright Data account: SSL certificates, billing and pricing, team access, user permissions, API keys and security settings from the Control Panel.
- [Referral Program](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/referral-program.md): Earn up to 50% of revenue from customers you refer to Bright Data. See how the referral program works, payout terms, and how it differs from affiliates.
- [SSL Certificate](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/ssl-certificate.md): Install and use Bright Data's SSL certificate on port 33335 for end-to-end encrypted connections with Residential, Mobile, Unlocker and SERP APIs.
- [Users Management](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/account/users-management.md): Manage Bright Data users and permissions across 3 access types: Control Panel users, proxy/API users and billing contacts, each with separate role scopes.
- [Azure Entra ID SSO Setup](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/authentication/How_to_set_up_Azure_SSO_Entra_ID_with_Bright_Data.md): Step-by-step guide to configuring Azure Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory) SSO and SCIM provisioning with Bright Data in 6 steps.
- [Google Workspace SSO Setup](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/authentication/How_to_set_up_SSO_with_Google_Workspace_in_Bright_Data.md): Configure Google Workspace OIDC SSO for Bright Data via a Google Cloud Console OAuth 2.0 client ID. Manual provisioning, hd-claim domain enforcement.
- [Okta SSO Setup with Bright Data](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/authentication/How_to_set_up_SSO_with_Okta_in_Bright_Data.md): Step-by-step guide to configure Okta OIDC SSO with Bright Data in 5 steps, plus SSO technical reference for enterprise security questionnaires.

- [App Privacy and Security](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/privacy/privacy-and-security-for-apps.md): How Bright Data ensures the privacy and security of users who install its apps across 3 protections: open-source SDK, sandboxing and user controls.
- [Protecting End User Resources](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/privacy/protect-end-users-resources.md): How Bright Data's idle monitor technology protects end users' battery, bandwidth and data plan across 3 resource categories when the device is a network node.
- [How does Bright Data handle Abuse Report?](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/security/abuse-report-handling.md): How Bright Data handles abuse reports: domain blocking, traffic investigation, and escalation to the compliance and legal team.
- [Allowlist and Denylist IPs and Domains](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/security/allowlist-denylist-ips-domains.md): Configure allowlists and denylists for IPs and domains in your Bright Data proxy zone (port 33335) to control who can access it for traffic security.
- [Bright Data Network Security](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/security/network-security.md): How Bright Data secures its virtual ISP network across 4 layers: registration requirements, DDoS prevention, domain denylisting and traffic monitoring.

- [Event Log](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/usage-monitoring/Event_log.md): How to read the Bright Data event log in the Zones dashboard to monitor recent proxy requests, IP usage, and zone activity at a glance.

- [SERP Fair Usage: Rate Limit](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/usage-monitoring/serp-rate-limit.md): Bright Data SERP API fair usage policy: global 100 QPS rate limit applied from January 2026, HTTP 429 behavior, and how to request an increase.
- [Webhook Notifications](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/webhook_notifications.md): Reference for every webhook notification event sent by Bright Data across 4 products, including event codes, categories and payload structure.
- [Webmaster Console](https://docs.brightdata.com/general/webmaster-console.md): Configure BrightBot crawl behavior for your domains with a collectors.txt file in the Bright Data Webmaster Console. Allow IP range 82.97.199.0/24 for access.

- [Google SERP Features](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/features.md): Configure Bright Data SERP API (31 languages) features including response format, parsing options and header overrides for Google search results.
- [Get started with Bing SERP API](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/get-started-bing-serp-api.md): Start using Bright Data's Bing SERP API in 3 steps: Sign in, create a SERP zone, get your API key, and begin collecting Bing search data.
- [Get started with Google SERP API](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/get-started-google-serp-api.md): Start using Bright Data's Google SERP API in 3 steps: Sign in, create a SERP zone, get your API key, and begin collecting Google search data.
- [Get Top 100 Google Results](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/get-top-100-google-results.md): Fetch positions 1-100 from Google search in a single Bright Data request with control over language, location, pagination depth and AI Overview extraction.
- [Guidelines for getting more Google ads](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/guidelines-for-getting-more-google-ads.md): Structure Bright Data SERP API requests across 31 languages to maximize paid-ad coverage. Tune query intent, vertical, geo and device for higher ad density.
- [Introduction to SERP API](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/introduction.md): Use the Bright Data SERP API to collect structured search results from Google, Bing and other engines in under 1 second per request, with no proxy setup.
- [Bing to Bright Data SERP Migration Guide](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/parsed-json-results/bing-to-bright-data-serp-migration-guide.md): Migrate from the retired Microsoft Bing Search API to the Bright Data SERP API (31 languages) for Bing. Step-by-step request mapping and response examples.
- [Parsed JSON Results with SERP API](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/parsed-json-results/parsing-search-results.md): Use Bright Data SERP API parsing to convert raw HTML responses into structured JSON for Google and Bing. Covers 12 countries.
- [SERP Pricing & Billing](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/pricing-and-billing.md): Bright Data SERP API pricing: per-1,000 successful requests with parsing and unlocking included, no bandwidth fees and failed requests not billed.
- [SERP API Bing Query Parameters](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/query-parameters/bing.md): Configure Bing search queries on the Bright Data SERP API (31 languages) with parameters for localization, geo, pagination, device targeting and custom output.
- [SERP API DuckDuckGo Query Parameters](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/query-parameters/duckduckgo.md): Configure DuckDuckGo search queries on the Bright Data SERP API (31 languages) with parameters for localization, safe search, time range and device targeting.
- [SERP API Google Query Parameters](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/query-parameters/google.md): Configure the Bright Data SERP API (31 languages) for Google search, Maps, Trends, Reviews, Images, Lens, Hotels and Flights with parameters per access point.
- [SERP API Yandex Query Parameters](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/query-parameters/yandex.md): Explore Yandex query parameters for the Bright Data SERP API (31 languages), including localization, pagination, time range and device targeting for results.
- [Create Your First SERP API](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/quickstart.md): Get started with the Bright Data SERP API (31 languages) in 3 steps: create a zone, generate credentials and send your first Google search query.
- [Send Your First SERP API Request](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/send-your-first-request.md): Step-by-step guide to sending your first SERP API request, with copy-paste curl examples for HTTP and SOCKS5 proxy interfaces.
- [Your First Async SERP API Request](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/serp-api/your-first-async-request.md): Send asynchronous requests to the Bright Data SERP API (31 languages) and retrieve search results via snapshot ID and webhook delivery.
- [Best practices for Unlocker API](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/bestpractices.md): Best practices for targeting API endpoints with the Bright Data Unlocker API (98% success rate), including troubleshooting and alternative methods.
- [Unlocker API Configuration](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/configuration.md): Configure the Bright Data Unlocker API (98% success rate): premium domains, async processing, custom headers, cookies and auto-throttling controls.
- [Web Unlocker API Features](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/features.md): Reference for Bright Data Unlocker API features (98% success rate): CAPTCHA solving, Premium Domains, custom headers, cookies and Browser Rendering.
- [Unlock Your First Website](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/five-minute-how-to.md): Unlock your first website with the Bright Data Unlocker API in under 5 minutes. Validate your setup with a minimal request before moving to advanced config.
- [Web Unlocker API Overview](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/introduction.md): Bright Data Web Unlocker API (98% success rate) handles proxy rotation, anti-bot challenges and CAPTCHA solving in 1 call. Returns clean HTML or JSON.
- [Create Your First Unlocker API](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/quickstart.md): Set up your first Bright Data Unlocker API (98% success rate): create the API in the Control Panel, configure credentials and send your first unlock request.
- [Send Your First Unlocker API Request](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/send-your-first-request.md): Send your first request using Bright Data Web Unlocker API (98% success rate) with step-by-step guidance, request breakdowns and real-world code examples.
- [How to Setup Webhooks for Unlocker API](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/setup-webhooks.md): Configure webhooks for the Bright Data Unlocker API (98% success rate) to receive HTTP callbacks when async data collection jobs complete, instead of polling.
- [Your First Async Unlocker API Request](https://docs.brightdata.com/scraping-automation/web-unlocker/your-first-async-request.md): Send asynchronous requests to the Bright Data Web Unlocker API (98% success rate) and retrieve results using a snapshot ID and webhook delivery method.
- [JavaScript SDK quickstart](https://docs.brightdata.com/sdk-js-quickstart.md)
- [Python SDK quickstart](https://docs.brightdata.com/sdk-quickstart.md)
- [Search API](https://docs.brightdata.com/search-api-quickstart.md)
- [Unlocker API quickstart](https://docs.brightdata.com/unlocker-api-quickstart.md)
